---
description: "Promote capture knowledge into the right durable home: lessons -> instruction files, recurring multi-step procedures -> skills, and durable /memories/ notes -> the version controlled customization library. USE FOR: deciding whether a lesson/memory should become an instruction or a skill, trimming lessons.md after promotion, keeping the knowledge stores from bloating. Mirrors the adr-capture flow, but for corrections and notes rather than decisions."
applyTo: '**/lessons/lessons.md,**/instructions/*.instructions.md,**/skills/**/SKILL.md'
---

# Lessons & Memory Promotion (knowledge hygiene)
